title: ocotea sandwithii
intro: Ocotea sandwithii, also known as Sandwith's Ocotea, is a plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America, specifically in Peru and Bolivia, belonging to the Lauraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ocotea sandwithii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Ocotea sandwithii typically involve steeping the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or infusing them in oil to create a topical application.
